vocab.meaning: một thành tựu đáng tự hào
vocab.example: For many self-made entrepreneurs, owning a luxury watch is seen as a feather in their cap, marking their professional success.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc cực kỳ sang trọng, chỉn chu
vocab.example: High-end timepieces are often worn by those who like to dress to the nines and want every detail of their outfit to look perfect.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền (thường dùng để nhấn mạnh sự đắt đỏ)
vocab.example: While some watches can break the bank, collectors believe the craftsmanship justifies the exorbitant cost.

vocab.meaning: muốn bằng bạn bằng bè (đua đòi theo tiêu chuẩn của người khác)
vocab.example: In some social circles, people buy expensive watches just to keep up with the Joneses and maintain a certain image.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Even though a limited-edition Patek Philippe might cost an arm and a leg, its value only increases over time.

vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: In the world of high finance, sporting a luxury watch is often considered part and parcel of the professional uniform.

vocab.word: at the end of the day
vocab.meaning: suy cho cùng, xét cho cùng
vocab.example: At the end of the day, an expensive watch is a marriage of art and engineering that many people find irresistible.

vocab.meaning: tiền bạc có tiếng nói (giàu có mang lại quyền lực/ảnh hưởng)
vocab.example: Some wear flashy watches because, in their industry, money talks and a watch is the most visible sign of liquidity.

vocab.word: separate the sheep from the goats
vocab.meaning: phân biệt giữa nhóm người/vật tầm thường và nhóm ưu tú
vocab.example: Horologists argue that the quality of a movement is what separates the sheep from the goats in the watchmaking world.

vocab.meaning: đáng đến từng đồng (đắt nhưng xắt ra miếng)
vocab.example: For those who appreciate hand-finished movements, a bespoke watch is worth every penny of its high price tag.
